title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at Phoenix Mills

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at Phoenix Mills
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Real Estate Agent looking for your next big career move? Phoenix Mills in Chennai offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Phoenix Mills:
Phoenix Mills is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Contract Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Phoenix Mills!
